<!-- Thanks for contributing to Satur8. Keep this short and honest. -->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Backend (new or changed display backend)
- [ ] Packaging / release
- [ ] Docs / website

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo build` succeeds
- [ ] `cargo check` and `cargo test --workspace --locked` pass
- [ ] Any new commands in the README/docs were actually run
- [ ] Backend status changes reflect real testing (Implemented vs Verified)
- [ ] Tested on: <!-- e.g. KDE Plasma Wayland / GNOME / X11+NVIDIA / gamescope; or "not tested on hardware" -->
